channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged pedestrian crossing, 11th June
item.description:
There has been an accident that has destroyed a portion of the pedestrian crossing at se22 8lb. Near Charles Talbot Mews on the lordship lave
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 11th June
item.description:
Fridge has been damp there for 2 or 3 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassilda Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhang in front of 39 and 45 The Chase, 11th June
item.description:
Overhanging Tree starts to raise safety concern to walking pedestrian as well as taller vehicles parking. Tree branches has also been occupying driveway at 43 The Chase since March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public pavement dug up, 11th June
item.description:
Pavement is completely dug up by builders / homeowner. Paving slabs nearby loose uneven hardcore put down in place. Pavement not safe for elderly, kids and disabled.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Hill, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned black top wheelie bin with no house number marked, 11th June
item.description:
Someone has left their wheelie bin on the street for over a month. It hasn't moved and is blocking the pavement which is already narrow. Not sure exactly where I should report this but the black top wheelie bin has been sitting there on the street for over a month untouched and doesn't seem to belong to any of the nearby houses (they all have their bins in their gardens). There are no markings on the bin to identify the owner.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ross Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I need parking space, 11th June
item.description:
This pothole has been here for two many time. I pay evry month for my car parking. But problem is i don’t get any parking space. Please do something
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 11th June
item.description:
These flats do not store their rubbish properly. This means that the foxes rip open the bags and rotting food/nappies/sanitary towels are left on the pavement. Unhygienic especially near the children’s play area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): College Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Super bright business sign at night, 10th June
item.description:
A car wash is opening up on green lanes and has recently installed this sign. The pictures don't convey how big and bright it is. These pics were taken after 2330, there is no need for it to be on. It's creating nuisance light pollution for our flats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed humps on Stetning Grove, 10th June
item.description:
The speed humps on Steyning Grove are not marked so its not easy to spot them. Thry are in the middle of the road where parked cars are on one side so only half your car can ride over it. They need reviewing and marking. Thry have been like this since of lived here, 3 years. There are approx 3 to 4 of them on the road unmarked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th June
item.description:
Rubbish been left on pavement and by garden path. Happened Tuesday evening approx 6.30pm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halt Robin Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering and suspected drug-related waste under basketball court stairs, 10th June
item.description:
There is a large accumulation of litter and waste underneath the stairs next to the basketball court. The area contains numerous small bottles/vials, general rubbish, plastic bags, broken glass and other waste materials. The condition of the site is deteriorating and appears to have been left unattended for a long time. The large number of identical small bottles raises concerns that they may be related to medication or other substances and could pose a health and safety risk, particularly as this is located directly beside a public basketball court used by children and families. In addition, there is a persistent litter problem across the basketball court itself, with rubbish regularly being left on and around the playing area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish Dumped by Utility Cabinet, 10th June
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement by the Utility Cabinet (by the Church). Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber Dumped on Pavement, 10th June
item.description:
A stack of unwanted timber has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 65. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Textiles Dumped on Pavement, 10th June
item.description:
A pile of unwanted textiles has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 101. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Items of Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path and Turned Area, 10th June
item.description:
Multiple items of unwanted furniture have been left dumped on the path and turned area. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
A large unwanted metal tank has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 10th June
item.description:
Several items of unwanted furniture have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Electrical Appliance Dumped at Top of Steps, 10th June
item.description:
An unwanted electrical appliance has been left dumped at the top of the steps. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrogen oxide canisters, 10th June
item.description:
Bag of canisters has been dumped again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lamp post has stoped working, 10th June
item.description:
They was a Car Incident that has involved a car hitting the pool and after that the pool has not worked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2F, Broomwood Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
